mainBoard.name: Towering Titan
mainBoard.originalText:
Towering Titan enters the battlefield with X +1/+1 counters on it, where X is the total toughness of other creatures you control.
Sacrifice a creature with defender: All creatures gain trample until end of turn.

rulings.text: If another creature is entering the battlefield at the same time as Towering Titan, its toughness won’t contribute to the +1/+1 counters on Towering Titan.
Once Towering Titan has entered the battlefield, it doesn’t gain or lose counters as the total toughness of other creatures you control changes.

mainBoard.name: Warmonger's Chariot
mainBoard.originalText:
Equipped creature gets +2/+2.
As long as equipped creature has defender, it can attack as though it didn't have defender.
Equip {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

rulings.text: If the equipped creature doesn’t have defender, the second ability simply doesn’t affect it.
The second ability doesn’t cause the equipped creature to lose defender. It just lets it attack.

mainBoard.text:

mainBoard.name: Assault Formation
mainBoard.originalText:
Each creature you control assigns combat damage equal to its toughness rather than its power.
{G}: Target creature with defender can attack this turn as though it didn't have defender.
{2}{G}: Creatures you control get +0/+1 until end of turn.

rulings.text: Assault Formation’s first ability doesn’t actually change any creature’s power. It changes only the amount of combat damage it assigns. All other rules and effects that check power or toughness use the real values. For example, Hunt the Weak won’t cause a creature to fight with its toughness.
For example, a 2/3 creature will assign 3 combat damage rather than 2.

mainBoard.text:
